Container.Name: redis
Container.Support:
https://forums.unraid.net/topic/199231-support-nodiaque-redis//Support> https://redis.io/
Redis is an open source (BSD licensed), in-memory data structure store, used as a database, cache and message broker. Based on official Redis Docker image.
You must create the config file first located at /mnt/user/appdata/redis/conf/redis.conf. See following link to get the files https://redis.io/docs/latest/operate/oss_and_stack/management/config/
If you want to use redis-full.conf, you must change the "Post Arguments" accordingly and refer to https://hub.docker.com/_/redis
Be sure to chmod to nobody:users the appdata folder and all files. Network:Management Productivity: Tools:Utilities
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nodiaque/unraid_template/master/nodiaque/redis.xml https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nodiaque/unraid_template/master/nodiaque/images/redis.png --user 99:100 redis-server /config/redis.conf
https://paypal.me/nodiaque If you like my work please consider Donating. Config File must be created at appdata/conf/redis.conf (unless you change mapping) https://redis.io/docs/latest/operate/oss_and_stack/management/config/ 6379 /mnt/user/appdata/redis/db/ /mnt/user/appdata/redis/conf/
